creator: ike@blackskyresearch.net
text:
Been using Tim Kintzle's scripts for a few months,
I've just rebuilt my 10.x "build-mule" machine, and I'm snagged somewhere new:

Building the cross-compiler tools is failing:
# make xdev XDEV=arm XDEV_ARCH=arm

I don't think it's relevant, but:
- I built the host using clang, (amd64)
- the boot disk is all zfs formatted on the host
  - just double-checked settings to make sure disks don't have inappropriate settings, AOK.
